title: Jaiz Mod
description: A collection of Vanilla+ Additions made by Jaiz
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/GSnIj6WYwuE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

this Mod is an extension of the game featuring all of the vanilla+ features I have created via making videos on youtube.

# [Devlog Youtube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@JaizYT)

for more info, refer to this feature document via google drive:
[JaizMod Feature Document](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1r-f0FN8aCoHDkNPhpLh68JXN6Q1HJcKx/view?usp=sharing)

This mod enchances the game with features promised by mojang and a selection of other mechanics created by myself to create my ultimate minecraft experience.
